title: I've tested the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8, and its new camera features make it an excellent vlogging camera alternative — so long as you don't mind the middling image quality
summary: Offering the same 50MP wide lens, 12MP ultra-wide lens, and 10MP selfie camera as both the Galaxy Z Flip 7 and Z Flip 6, the Z Flip 8 does little to impress.
caption: output/2026-07-22/i-ve-tested-the-samsung-galaxy-z-flip-8-and-its-new-camera-features-ma.txt
